topWPAPlays.description: Ryan O'Hearn homers (7) on a fly ball to center field. Bryan Reynolds scores.
Troy Johnston doubles (12) on a fly ball to right fielder Ryan O'Hearn. TJ Rumfield scores. Willi Castro scores.
Oneil Cruz doubles (9) on a sharp fly ball to left fielder Jordan Beck.
Endy Rodríguez singles on a line drive to center fielder Brenton Doyle. Ryan O'Hearn scores. Konnor Griffin scores. Marcell Ozuna to 2nd.
Bryan Reynolds singles on a line drive to left fielder Jordan Beck. Oneil Cruz scores.
Matt McLain homers (4) on a fly ball to center field. Spencer Steer scores.
Jose Trevino singles on a ground ball to center fielder Jacob Young, deflected by shortstop CJ Abrams. Spencer Steer scores. Blake Dunn scores. Matt McLain to 3rd.
Ke'Bryan Hayes doubles (2) on a line drive to left fielder Daylen Lile. Matt McLain scores. Jose Trevino scores.
Luis García Jr. walks.
Jorbit Vivas doubles (4) on a ground ball to right fielder Blake Dunn.
Gage Workman homers (2) on a fly ball to left center field. Colt Keith scores. Riley Greene scores.

Juan Soto singles on a ground ball to center fielder Wenceel Pérez. Carson Benge scores.
A.J. Ewing homers (1) on a fly ball to right center field.
Austin Martin hits a ground-rule double (7) on a fly ball down the left-field line. Royce Lewis scores. Ryan Kreidler scores. James Outman to 3rd.
Josh Bell doubles (8) on a ground ball to left fielder Kyle Stowers. James Outman scores. Austin Martin scores. Ryan Jeffers to 3rd.
Brooks Lee doubles (6) on a sharp fly ball to left fielder Kyle Stowers. Austin Martin to 3rd.
Victor Caratini strikes out swinging.
Luke Keaschall strikes out swinging.
Luis Rengifo singles on a ground ball to right fielder Nick Castellanos. William Contreras scores. Gary Sánchez scores. Andrew Vaughn to 3rd.
Andrew Vaughn walks. Brice Turang scores. William Contreras to 3rd. Gary Sánchez to 2nd.
Gary Sánchez walks. Brice Turang to 3rd. William Contreras to 2nd.
Gavin Sheets grounds out, third baseman Luis Rengifo to first baseman Andrew Vaughn.
Gary Sánchez doubles (3) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Bryce Johnson. Brice Turang scores.

Mitch Garver homers (1) on a fly ball to left field. J.P. Crawford scores.
Yordan Alvarez homers (14) on a fly ball to center field.
Randy Arozarena grounds into a double play, third baseman Isaac Paredes to second baseman Jose Altuve to first baseman Christian Walker. Josh Naylor out at 2nd. Randy Arozarena out at 1st.
Brendan Donovan doubles (4) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Cam Smith.
Jordan Walker doubles (9) on a fly ball to right fielder Colby Thomas. JJ Wetherholt scores. Iván Herrera to 3rd.
Iván Herrera singles on a ground ball to left fielder Tyler Soderstrom. Thomas Saggese scores. JJ Wetherholt to 2nd.
Shea Langeliers singles on a ground ball to center fielder Victor Scott II. Jeff McNeil scores. Colby Thomas scores. Nick Kurtz to 2nd.
Jordan Walker homers (12) on a line drive to right center field.
Victor Scott II homers (2) on a fly ball to right field.
Kyle Schwarber homers (18) on a fly ball to right field. Trea Turner scores.
Edmundo Sosa strikes out swinging.
Trea Turner challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Trea Turner called out on strikes.
Willson Contreras grounds out, shortstop Trea Turner to first baseman Bryce Harper.
Andruw Monasterio doubles (6) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Felix Reyes.
Seiya Suzuki reaches on a fielder's choice. Ian Happ to 3rd. Ian Happ advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by shortstop Ha-Seong Kim.
Ian Happ homers (10) on a fly ball to right center field.
Seiya Suzuki strikes out swinging.
Ian Happ singles on a fly ball to right fielder Mike Yastrzemski. Alex Bregman to 3rd.
Ozzie Albies flies out to left fielder Ian Happ.
Randal Grichuk homers (3) on a fly ball to left center field. Munetaka Murakami scores.

Bobby Witt Jr. singles on a ground ball to center fielder Derek Hill. Maikel Garcia to 3rd.
Salvador Perez grounds into a double play, third baseman Miguel Vargas to second baseman Chase Meidroth to first baseman Munetaka Murakami. Lane Thomas out at 2nd. Salvador Perez out at 1st.
Munetaka Murakami walks. Chase Meidroth to 3rd. Miguel Vargas to 2nd.
Alex Call singles on a line drive to right fielder Jung Hoo Lee. Max Muncy scores. Teoscar Hernández scores. Alex Call to 2nd.

Dalton Rushing strikes out swinging.
